name: Homemade Heath Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Melt butter and stir in brown sugar until combined.
3. Spread the mixture evenly on a greased baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Sprinkle chopped nuts over the melted mixture.
5. Place the unwrapped Hershey bars on top of the mixture.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until edges are golden brown.
7. Let cool completely in the pan before cutting into squares.
